justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all errors pattern confirmed (single-pass accumulator, not fail-fast). AC5 conditional required for express correctly distinct from AC6 conditional forbidden for standard. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with multi-failure requests (2-error and 3-error cases). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs.

observations.text: AC5/AC6 distinction is precise: saturday_delivery:false treated as 'provided' for AC6 and 'provided' for AC5, matching correct semantics
15 tests including boundary values (weight_kg=1000) and whitespace-only recipient_name
AC7 verified with exact error counts (2 and 3) to confirm no extra or missing errors
Assumptions about undefined weight_kg and missing shipment_type are reasonable and documented
